summary: Iteration 27: Telegram Bot Integration with priority-based notification timing. All backend tests pass (12/12), frontend tests pass. Features tested: Telegram webhook (/start command), /api/telegram/status endpoint, /api/telegram/link endpoint, TelegramConnectCard component with tier timing display (PREMIUM 0min, PRO 10min, BASIC manual), regression tests for scanner3d/pdf and ai-chart/pdf-contract, subscription plans API.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/telegram/status returns linked status for authenticated user
✅ POST /api/telegram/link with auth links chat_id successfully
✅ GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns БАЗОВ (15), ПРО (35), PREMIUM (75) with notification_delay info
✅ Subscriptions page loads at /subscriptions with 3 tier cards
✅ Register page loads with company registration form
✅ Company dashboard loads at /dashboard after registration
✅ TelegramConnectCard shows ПРО: +10 мін. (10 minute delay)
✅ Subscriptions page shows notification timing info (PREMIUM 10:00ч., ПРО 10:10ч.)
critical_code_review_comments: 1. TelegramConnectCard component correctly implements tier-based display with color-coded dots for PREMIUM/PRO/BASIC
2. notify_companies_new_project() uses asyncio.create_task for delayed PRO notifications (10 min)
3. Telegram webhook correctly handles /start command with optional user_id parameter
4. /api/telegram/status returns linked boolean and chat_id for authenticated users
5. /api/telegram/link updates user document with telegram_chat_id and sends confirmation message
6. send_telegram_message() supports both text and photo+caption format for rich notifications
7. Subscription plans include notification_delay field showing timing for each tier
8. All data-testid attributes properly implemented: telegram-connect-card, link-telegram-btn
seed_data_creation: Company users created via /api/auth/register for Telegram status/link testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 complete. Telegram bot integration fully working: /api/telegram/webhook handles /start, /api/telegram/status returns linked status, /api/telegram/link requires auth and links chat_id. TelegramConnectCard component displays in company dashboard with tier timing info (PREMIUM 0min, PRO 10min, BASIC manual). notify_companies_new_project uses asyncio.create_task for 10-minute delayed PRO notifications. Bot name is @TemaDomBot.

telegram_webhook.details: POST /api/telegram/webhook returns 200 for /start command, handles user_id parameter

telegram_link.details: POST /api/telegram/link requires auth, links chat_id to user, sends confirmation

telegram_connect_card.details: TelegramConnectCard shows in company dashboard with tier timing (PREMIUM 0min, PRO +10min, BASIC manual)

subscription_plans.details: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns БАЗОВ/ПРО/PREMIUM with notification_delay info

telegram_integration_details.rich_notifications: Photo support via send_telegram_message with photo_url parameter
